description: Tasks rewritten to match actual generated data

tasks.instruction: Submit a website redesign quote request through the custom quote form, specifying a page count, exact budget, desired timeline, and your contact details.
tasks.name: Submit a website redesign quote request through the custom quote form, specifying a page count, exact budget, desired timeline, and your contact details.

tasks.instruction: From the maintenance plans, choose the lowest-priced monthly option that provides at least 10 support hours per month, then start onboarding by entering your company details and a preferred start date next month.
tasks.name: From the maintenance plans, choose the lowest-priced monthly option that provides at least 10 support hours per month, then start onboarding by entering your company details and a preferred start date next month.

tasks.instruction: In the case studies, filter for ecommerce projects, sort by conversion uplift from highest to lowest, then save the first project with at least a 20% conversion rate increase to your shortlist and reopen it from there.

target_names: Aurora Market: 32% Conversion Lift from Checkout Redesign

tasks.name: In the case studies, filter for ecommerce projects, sort by conversion uplift from highest to lowest, then save the first project with at least a 20% conversion rate increase to your shortlist and reopen it from there.

tasks.instruction: Search the blog for SaaS onboarding content from 2023, sort the results by newest first, then save the newest article tagged with UX and a minimum 5-minute read time to your reading list and reopen it from there before scrolling midway.

target_names: 5 Onboarding Metrics Every SaaS Product Team Should Track

tasks.instruction: Use the project estimator to configure a project that includes both a mobile app and a marketing website, adjust feature tiers so the total estimated cost stays within your budget, set that budget in the target field, and save the estimate using the on-site save function with your contact details.

tasks.instruction: Using the discovery call scheduler, in the current month select a Wednesday, pick the earliest available 30-minute morning slot between 9:00 and 11:00 in UTC, and confirm the booking with your contact details and a discussion topic.

tasks.instruction: On the UX research hourly pricing, set the engagement to around 80 hours, select any option that results in an hourly rate under $200, and send an inquiry mentioning that hour range and rate along with your contact information.

expected_values.subject: UX research hourly engagement
expected_values.message_text: We are looking for up to 80 hours of UX research support at your hourly rate under $200/hour.

tasks.instruction: Compare the branding packages to find the lowest-priced option under your budget that includes at least 3 logo concepts and a brand guidelines document, choose one-time payment with no add-ons, and begin onboarding by entering your company details and planned brand launch date.
